summary: Backend testing complete for VIP Pro customization. Created /app/backend/tests/test_vip_pro.py with 15 pytest cases covering catalog, settings GET/PUT (with auth, tier-gating, validation, clear-via-empty-string), 30-day monthly 2000 coin grant on login (forced last-grant to 35 days ago to trigger, verified same-day re-login does NOT grant), enriched fields on messages GET/POST, profile-card, room members, and direct messages (both self and other sender). All 15 tests passed (15/15 = 100%).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 3725 lines — should be split into modules (auth, vip_pro, messages, rooms, board, etc.) for maintainability.

send_message broadcasts/return uses current_user customization fields, but get_messages re-reads sender from DB. Acceptable, but two sources of truth could drift if cache is added; consider extracting an enrich_sender(msg, user) helper to keep both paths identical.
_validate_color accepts hex of length 4/7/9 but does not validate the actual hex digits; '#zzzz' would pass. Minor; tighten with regex if needed.
VIP_PRO_GRANT_INTERVAL_DAYS check uses .days which can be off-by-one near boundaries (29.99 days returns 29). Acceptable for a 30-day cadence but document the inclusive boundary.
get_room_members loops with N+1 user lookups (one find_one per member). For a 36-member room it's fine, but consider $in bulk fetch.
VipProSettings model accepts arbitrary string for vipBadgeId but validation is endpoint-side only; could move to a Pydantic validator for cleaner errors.
test_credentials: vippro@test.com / Test123! (VIP Pro tier, id 6a250eb3b01b44bc01fb812c). Free users dynamically registered with TEST_ prefix and cleaned up.
seed_data_creation: Each test run registers a fresh TEST_free_<hex>@example.com user (deleted in fixture teardown). VIP user's vipProMonthlyGrantAt was rewound 35 days during the grant test to force a grant — current value reflects the most recent test run's UTC timestamp. The VIP user is also force-joined to room 6a250fb3887fc39328a98cd4 (currentRoomId set) for message tests. No production data was modified beyond the VIP user's own customization/coins/grant timestamp.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Run: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_vip_pro.py -v. The VIP user's coins and customization are mutated by these tests (PUT sets badge_crown/glow/etc., monthly-grant test adds 2000 coins). vipProMonthlyGrantAt is reset to now on each run, so the next-30-days metadata is fresh. Room id used: 6a250fb3887fc39328a98cd4. Backend tests use BACKEND_BASE_URL env (defaults to http://localhost:8001) since this repo has no REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL / EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL configured.
